calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jan-28-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Charlotte Ito, via ZOOM, for See Lam, Administrator.
The court advises Ms. Ito that it is not persuaded to allow the request for extraordinary fees. Ms. Ito provides oral advocacy for the request and confirms that the $50 "hearing" fee was regarding the appeals board meeting.

The Accounting Petition is submitted.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: C. Gomez. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Nov-09-2021 Off Calendar

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Feb-09-2021 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Nov-18-2020 Off Calendar

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Nov-18-2020 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-21-2020 Continued To Nov-18-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court noted that notice was given at the time of appointment of today's hearing. An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator See Yan Lam and the Attorney Charlotte Ito to appear on November 18, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration has not been filed. Status on close of estate is also continued to that date.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
